name: heaven-think-on-these-things
description: Carl Martin's 'Heaven: Think On These Things' — a biblically grounded exploration of heaven as a real place with real people, real relationships, and real purpose on a redeemed new earth.
useCase: Gain a biblical understanding of heaven, find comfort in grief, explore theological questions about the afterlife, and develop an eternal perspective for daily life.
knownRisks: Primarily Christian perspective — may not resonate with non-Christian readers
Speculative elements — Martin acknowledges some descriptions are imaginative extrapolations from biblical texts
Some theological positions (e.g., new earth, resurrection bodies) may differ across denominations
